summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. Two anchors appear in split screen at the start, with the lower-third TODAY: CONVICTED CHILD ABUSER FACES SENTENCING. The segment cuts to a woman with blonde hair speaking at a microphone outside the U.S. Capitol, the same lower-third displayed.

script.scene: Two anchors appear in split screen; lower-third reads TODAY: CONVICTED CHILD ABUSER FACES SENTENCING.
A woman speaks at a microphone outside the Capitol under the same banner.
Continued footage with the FOX NEWS ALERT banner.

notable_text: TODAY: CONVICTED CHILD ABUSER FACES SENTENCING; FOX NEWS ALERT
